title: astragalus gilmanii
intro: Astragalus gilmanii, also known as the Gilman's milkvetch, is a plant species in the legume family (Fabaceae) and is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as boosting the immune system, reducing stress, and improving cardiovascular health. Astragalus gilmanii can be prepared in various herbal forms, including capsules, teas, and tinctures, which are often used to support overall well-being and prevent illness.
